title: Title 14, Code of Federal Regulations, Part 101, Subpart C—Amateur Rockets
description: Federal regulations governing the classification and operation of amateur rockets, including operating limitations, high-power rocket restrictions, FAA notification requirements, and required launch information.
author_or_issuing_organization: Federal Aviation Administration, U.S. Department of Transportation
copyright_or_permission_status: Official United States federal regulatory text that is publicly accessible for reading, citation, and reuse.
scope: Amateur rocket operations within United States jurisdiction under 14 CFR sections 101.21 through 101.29.
verification_status: Verified against the official eCFR webpage on 2026-07-14.
known_limitations: The eCFR is continuously updated and may change when amendments take effect.
This source does not include all state, local, landowner, fire-code, launch-site, or NAR requirements.
Some provisions apply only to Class 2 and Class 3 amateur rockets.
